subject: creator data - {{company_name}}
email_body:
Hey {{first_name}},

Quick question — when your team is looking for creators, where does the data come from? Is it your own layer or a vendor?

We work with influencer platforms like yours and see a gap pretty often: the platform runs on vendor data, so when clients ask for transparency or custom segments, there's not much to show.

OnSocial builds the data layer directly — 450M+ creators, real engagement metrics, audience insights. Some platforms use it to power their own search and reporting instead of renting access.

Worth a look?

Best,
{{sender_name}}

subject: Re: creator data - {{company_name}}
